title: OverEnchant
description: OverEnchant allows up to 32 bookshelves around the enchanting table, increasing the max level to 64 and enabling enchants beyond vanilla limits (e.g., Sharpness 11).
body:
# OverEnchant

Vanilla Minecraft caps enchanting at 15 bookshelves and level 30.
This plugin removes that limit.

You can place up to **32 bookshelves** around the enchanting table (normal vanilla layout). The level requirement scales with the amount of shelves, up to **level 64**.

Enchantments scale directly with the cost.

* Sharpness V → Sharpness XI
* Fortune III → Fortune VI

XP usage is also adjusted.
Vanilla only removes up to 3 levels, but higher-tier enchants now take more (for example, a level 64 enchant costs 6 levels).

## Features

* Up to 32 bookshelf support
* Enchant scaling past vanilla limits
* Corrected XP cost scaling
* Supports 1.21 Spigot/Paper
* Works with normal and filled Chiseled Bookshelves
